news.t: Department-store shares soar after clothing sales jump more than 700% from April 2020
Market Extra: Here are some ETFs for Black Friday

overview.description: The ProShares Decline of the Retail Store ETF (EMTY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund provides inverse exposure to an equally weighted index of US stocks in the retail industry using swap agreements. EMTY was launched on Nov 14, 2017 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: A Pair of ETFs Betting Against Retail Stores
data.text: On "Bloomberg ETF IQ", Scarlet Fu takes a look at two ETFs that let investors bet against physical retail stores: ProShares Long Online/Short Stores ETF (ticker: CLIX) and the ProShares Decline of the...

data.title: Department-store shares soar after clothing sales jump more than 700% from April 2020
data.text: Macy's, which reports first-quarter earnings on Tuesday, rose nearly 9% in Friday trading.
